summary: Tailwind v4 declares design tokens in CSS via the `@theme` block. The JS config is optional; tokens become CSS custom properties accessible as `var(--color-…)`.
bestPractices: Author tokens in CSS with `@theme` in your global stylesheet (e.g. `app/globals.css`).
Reference tokens via `var(--token-name)` or via Tailwind utility classes — both stay in sync.
Use `@import "tailwindcss"` instead of the v3-era `@tailwind base/components/utilities` triplet.
antiPatterns: Maintaining both a JS `tailwind.config.{js,ts}` and a v4 `@theme` block — they will drift.
Hardcoding hex values into utility class arbitrary values when an equivalent token exists.
Using v3 directives (`@tailwind base`) under v4 — they are deprecated and produce warnings.
